prestazioni: Engine: F106 AB 3.0L V8 (2926cc) with a custom-built dry-sump system by GTO Engineering, featuring billet aluminum oil pump gears and a 10-quart Accusump reservoir to prevent oil starvation during high-G cornering.

Forced Induction: Single Garrett GT35R turbocharger (82mm compressor wheel, .82 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom air-to-water intercooler by Bell Intercoolers, utilizing a Bosch 044 fuel pump and ID1000 injectors for a target of 450whp on 93 octane.

Suspension: Full Ohlins TTX40 coilover kit with 24-position rebound and 22-position compression damping, custom-valved for the 308’s unequal-length A-arms, paired with spherical bearing upper control arms by Superformance and polygraphite bushings from Energy Suspension.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion by Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS 308 GTS kit), including extended front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom 3-piece rear diffuser with integrated exhaust cutouts for dual 3.5" titanium exhaust tips by Capristo.

Wheels: 17x9.5" front and 17x11" rear OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels in gold finish, wrapped in 245/40/17 and 295/35/17 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, with custom 5x108 to 4x98 hubcentric adapters by Wavetrac.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Saddleback Leather, including a custom 3-spoke MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with a quick-release hub, Recaro Pole Position seats with 4-point Schroth harnesses, and a custom roll cage by Kirk Racing with integrated fire suppression system by SPA Techniques.
